data.arabic_text: ((اللَّهُمَّ اسْقِ عِبَادَكَ، وَبَهَائِمَكَ، وَانْشُرْ رَحْمَتَكَ، وَأَحْيِي بَلَدَكَ الْمَيِّتَ)).
data.english_text: (O Allah, provide water for Your servants and Your cattle, spread out Your mercy and resurrect Your dead land.)
data.transliteration: (Allahummas-qi AAibadak, wabaha-imak, wanshur rahmatak, wa-ahyi baladakal-mayyit.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Allahummas-qi AAibadak, wabaha-imak, wanshur rahmatak, wa-ahyi baladakal-mayyit.)
